1.0.0.description:
# Viscera Cleanup Detail Archipelago - First Release

**What gets randomized**
- 26 (Base + DLC) levels, each behind its own access item. Configure how many start unlocked, trim the level pool, or play a random subset each seed.
- Per-level checks: a cleanliness milestone ladder (every 5% by default), Employee of the Month at 100%, a Punch Out check, optional Speedrun checks, and optional rungs past 100%, going up to the max minus some margin.
- Toolsanity (on by default): each level's tools (hands, welder, shovel, J-HARM, vendor, incinerator) are items too, and logic knows exactly what every toolkit can clean. You start with a mop + buckets, unless you opt to randomize the starting kit too.
- 39 collectibles and 6 Bob notes are checks: bank them in your trunk and punch out in good standing.
- Three goals: complete x amount of levels, find Bob or bank collectibles.
- Optional traps (mess dumps, spilled buckets, speed changes, a magnet pull), bin/bucket drops, death link, and trap link.
- Per-level Self-Cleaning Mop and Squeaky Clean Boots convenience items.

**Comfort**
- The client installs the precompiled mod into your game automatically, isolates each seed's saves from your career, and launches the game for you. Just pick your install folder and you are good to go.
- In-game messages mirror the Archipelago text client and a live cleaned % plus the next milestone sit in the top-right corner.
- Co-op works.
- Universal Tracker supported.

1.0.1.description: Fix Levels not loading when you don't have DLC's.
